title: Nine-point per-regime per-seed-averaged trivial Hilbert-variation contributions to T_00 (variance(Xi), variance(|Psi|), <|grad Psi|^2>_node)
scope: Per-regime aggregates of the four scalar quantities that enter the Hilbert variation T_00 = 0.5 Z_Xi var(Xi) + kappa_Xi var(|Psi|) + zeta_1 omega <|grad Psi|^2>_node + zeta_3 omega K_rec, computed per seed (4 seeds per regime) with the per-node Laplace-Beltrami weights that match the Phase F implementation in src/verify_lambda_frobenius_exact_offdiagonal.py.

K_rec_inf_via_zeta_3.structural_reading: alpha_xi + eps_sync_sq - gamma = 9/10 + 1/20 - 1/10 = 17/20 (non-scalar Clifford-channel rate, Phase D)

grad_psi_squared_inf_via_zeta_1.structural_reading: alpha_xi/2 - gamma/N_gen = 9/20 - 1/30 = 5/12 (Lemma 1 spinor-trace minus Lemma 5 generation, N_gen=3)

Lambda_lat_inf_total.verification_chain: alpha = 2/3 fixed analytically by Theorem 15.18 P2 (not free parameter); LOO jackknife confirms 19/15 inside range [1.259, 1.284] with 0.05 sigma distance to target

computation_provenance.source: Per-seed scalar contributions extracted from parent corpus D1 NPZ at d1_lattice_payload/d1_p[0-5].npz and d1_lattice_payload/p[6-8]/d1_p[6-8].npz, averaged over 4 seeds per regime

formulae.var_Xi: numpy.var(xi_matrix) per seed, mean over 4 seeds per regime
formulae.var_amp: numpy.var(|node_amplitude|) per seed, mean over 4 seeds per regime
formulae.grad_psi_squared: per-node sum over neighbours of weight_ab * |Psi_b - Psi_a|^2 / sum_b weight_ab, with weight_ab = Xi_ab / d_ab^2 (Laplace-Beltrami) and d_ab = -ell_0 log(Xi_ab); averaged over nodes, then over seeds
formulae.K_rec_row_mean: a_K * <K(x)> + a_Q * (1 - <Q(x)>) per seed (Definition 12.20), mean over 4 seeds per regime

downstream_uses: src/verify_lambda_19_15_breakthrough.py: System-R algebraic Theorem 19/15 = 17/20 + 5/12 verification + LOO jackknife
